DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-22-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT WACHOVIA MORTGAGE, A DIVISION OF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. FORMERLY KNOWN AS WACHOVIA MORTGAGE, FSB AND WORLD SAVINGS BANK, FSB SUED AS WACHOVIA MORTGAGE'S DEMURRERS TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. AS TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION, PLAINTIFF MUST SEPARATE THE BREACH OF CONTRACT AND VIOLATION OF C.C. SECTION 2923.5 CLAIMS INTO 2 CAUSES OF ACTION. THE ALLEGED ORAL AGREEMENT IS BARRED BY THE DEED OF TRUST THAT STATES THAT ALL MODIFICATION AGREEMENTS MUST BE REDUCED TO WRITING. THE C.C. SECTION 2923.5 CLAIM DOES NOT ALLEGE THAT DEFENDANTS DID NOT CONTACT PLAINTIFF PRIOR TO THE NOTICE OF DEFAULT, AND THE COMPLAINT ALLEGES CONTACT WAS MADE. THERE IS NOTHING IN C.C. SECTION 2923.5 THAT REQUIRES THE LENDER TO REWRITE OR MODIFY THE LOAN. SEE MABRY V. SUPERIOR COURT (2010) 185 CAL. APP. 4TH 208. AS TO THE 2ND, 3RD AND 5TH CAUSES OF ACTION, THE CLAIMS MUST BE PLED WITH PARTICULARITY. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT ADDRESS THE FACT THAT THERE WAS NO ASSIGNMENT OR SALE, BUT ONLY A CHANGE IN DEFENDANT'S NAME WHICH IS PROPERLY JUDICIALLY NOTICED. PLAINTIFF MUST STATE FACTS SUPPORTING RELIANCE AND RESULTING DAMAGES. ALSO, AS TO THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION INSUFFICIENT FACTS ARE PLEAD THAT THE AGREEMENT IS VOID AND DEFENDANT, AS A LENDER, OWES NO DUTY TO DISCLOSE THAT PLAINTIFF COULD NOT HAVE QUALIFIED FOR THE LOAN. AS TO THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION, PLAINTIFF DOES NOT ADDRESS DEFENDANT'S AUTHORITIES THAT THERE IS NO PRIVATE RIGHT OF ACTION UNDER THE STATUTE AND THERE IS NO DUTY TO OFFER A LOAN MODIFICATION. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ALLEGED TENDER TO SUPPORT INJUNCTIVE RELIEF OR THE REQUEST TO QUIET TITLE. THE 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION DOES NOT ALLEGE SPECIFIC FACTS DETAILING THE ALLEGED CONTROVERSY. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
